category_sources: Official Potrace homepage describes transforming bitmaps into smooth scalable vector images
source_facts.description: convert bitmaps to vector graphics
display_name_sources: Official Potrace homepage title is Potrace
docs_sources: Official Potrace homepage contains Usage and Technical documentation sections
Official Potrace technical documentation links to potrace and mkbitmap man pages plus algorithm and library API PDFs
repo_sources: Official Potrace site provides release tarballs and a SourceForge project page, but no official source-control repository URL was identified
tags_sources: Official Potrace homepage describes PBM/PGM/PPM/BMP input and vector outputs such as SVG and PDF
